commit.message:
fix: test-bridged 2-hop graph expansion for cross-file chains

When a test file ranks in the top-10 and connects via graph to a
non-test source file (hop1), that source file is now expanded one
further hop. Recovers cross-file chains like:
  prompt-builder.test.ts → prompt-builder.ts → orchestrator.ts

Targeted design: only fires on test→source paths, avoiding the
scope leaks that occur with unrestricted depth=2 expansion.

Also: extracted isTestFile() as a private class method so both
processRawResults and expandWithGraphNeighbors share the same logic.

Tests: 712/712 passing (+1 new test for test-bridged 2-hop case)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add Wound & Skin Care study page for D439

Comprehensive nursing study page covering:
- Wound classification (intentional/unintentional, open/closed, acute/chronic,
  depth, contamination classes I-IV, pressure injury stages I-IV + unstageable + DTPI)
- Wound drainage types (serous, serosanguineous, sanguineous, purulent)
  and drainage devices (Jackson-Pratt, Hemovac, Penrose)
- Primary, secondary, and tertiary wound healing intention with phases
- Braden Scale: six subscales (S-M-A-M-N-F), scoring 6-23, risk levels
- Pressure injury prevention bundle (repositioning, specialty surfaces,
  moisture management, nutrition, skin inspection)
- Proper wound care: assessment documentation, cleansing technique,
  dressing selection, dehiscence/evisceration emergencies
- Diabetic foot care: neuropathy/PVD risks, daily inspection, nail care,
  hygiene, footwear, provider notification criteria
- Shearing force: definition, mechanism, prevention strategies

Includes breadcrumb nav, table of contents, clinical callout boxes,
exam tips, and PREV/NEXT navigation links.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix typo: correct padding unit 'mm' to 'rem' in table cell

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add Infection Control & Asepsis page for D439

Comprehensive exam-prep page covering all 9 topics:
- Medical asepsis, chain of infection, and when to use clean technique
- Surgical asepsis principles and when sterile technique is required
- Step-by-step sterile field setup with common error callouts
- CDC 5-step handwashing, WHO 5 moments, soap vs sanitizer comparison
- Alcohol-based hand rub correct technique and contraindications
- Clean glove donning/doffing procedure
- Sterile gloving step-by-step with inner/outer cuff rules
- PPE types, donning (gown→mask→goggles→gloves) and doffing order
- Droplet precautions: required infections, PPE, room requirements,
  transport protocols, and precautions comparison table

Includes breadcrumb nav, table of contents, clinical callout boxes,
exam tip boxes, quick reference summary, and prev/next navigation.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Polish D439 nursing-process page: American spelling and formal phrasing

- 'metres' → 'meters' for U.S. nursing education consistency
- 'so nothing is missed' → 'to ensure all areas are assessed' (more formal)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add D439 Nursing Process (ADPIE) study page

Create comprehensive exam-ready study page covering:
- ADPIE: Assessment (subjective/objective data, types), Diagnosis
  (NANDA-I, PES format), Planning (SMART goals, Maslow's hierarchy),
  Implementation (independent/dependent/collaborative), Evaluation
  (outcome evaluation, care plan revision)
- Critical thinking in nursing: definition, clinical judgment, NGN CJMM,
  critical thinking at each ADPIE step, attributes of a critical thinker
- Assessment interview techniques: open/closed questions, active
  listening, clarification, reflection, therapeutic silence, body
  language, therapeutic communication
- Numbered steps-of-the-nursing-process quick-recall format with table
- Most important things during assessment: complete/accurate data,
  therapeutic relationship, non-judgmental approach, subjective AND
  objective data
- Breadcrumb nav, TOC sidebar, exam tips, quick facts, prev/next nav

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Refactor code structure for improved readability and maintainability

commit.message:
Initial commit: Banking API Test Automation Framework

Karate DSL framework for banking microservices with:
- Loan pricing and origination API tests
- Kafka event validation with correlation-based filtering
- JDBC database verification with retry/polling
- End-to-end workflow tests
- Multi-environment config (dev/sit)
- GitLab CI/CD pipeline and Docker support

commit.message:
fix(ci): pass RELEASE_TOKEN to checkout for git push auth

The checkout step configures git credentials. Without passing the PAT
here, git push still uses the default GITHUB_TOKEN which cannot
bypass branch protection.

commit.message:
feat(api): add request retries & fix(container): Error on failing to get published apps (#41)

**API Retries:**
([AB#4708](https://dev.azure.com/cc-ppi/83f75d99-795d-45dc-8543-9fe1918ff7f9/_workitems/edit/4708))

* Added `$Retries` and `$NoRetryStatusCodes` parameters to
`Invoke-AlpacaApiRequest`, implementing exponential backoff and skipping
retries for specific HTTP status codes.
* Updated all module functions that call `Invoke-AlpacaApiRequest` (such
as `Get-AlpacaAppInfo`, `Get-AlpacaConfigSyncStatus`,
`Get-AlpacaDependencyApps`, `New-AlpacaContainer`,
`Remove-AlpacaContainer`, `Sync-AlpacaConfigs`,
`Wait-AlpacaContainerImageReady`) to use the new retry functionality,
typically with 3 retries.
[[1]](diffhunk://#diff-47612468828038e919c91067c0f6a941f56de6802d0945fce23ae0b256d0c463L14-R14)
[[2]](diffhunk://#diff-c66b366d7a80f0d6e7e1d3684067900a005e79366e8c3819f75f85c2eac0c0d9L12-R12)
[[3]](diffhunk://#diff-676c982eb1f3b2eec8c6d5713156adab85d75a5506cf5b2cd7bdb848c73cfb09L32-R32)
[[4]](diffhunk://#diff-73198a54cf38fb6e89441675dea6390f6639451dbd304cb25bef345a727e0edaL45-R45)
[[5]](diffhunk://#diff-5a3470d7c24b460e3d5ff91dec89cc62eebbae894452117fcf6af6ccae56d68bL21-R21)
[[6]](diffhunk://#diff-652cfd2ef00a4980d390638aa36af9a79160bd63d29e954233c03f27b1d44fa1L18-R18)
[[7]](diffhunk://#diff-5a3325e25f9937282b863bd9efb664c4fc06e3338f050b4b726e7f3ff6adfe88L36-R36)

**Retrieving published App:**
([AB#4656](https://dev.azure.com/cc-ppi/83f75d99-795d-45dc-8543-9fe1918ff7f9/_workitems/edit/4656))

* Removed try/catch for retrieving published apps to throw possible
errors and stop the workflow
* Improved variable initialization for published apps

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add 'Best Available' glass item option

Dynamically selects the highest-XP glass item the player can make at
each crafting level. GoalCalculator walks level brackets to compute
accurate glass/casts needed across item transitions (e.g., vials at 33,
orbs at 46, lantern lenses at 49, light orbs at 87).

- Add BEST_AVAILABLE sentinel to GlassItem enum
- Add bestItemForLevel(int) static method
- Add bracket-walking glassNeededBestAvailable() to GoalCalculator
- All calc methods resolve BEST_AVAILABLE via currentGlassItem()
- Overlay uses current level's best item automatically

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Update contact info and fix content issues

- Email updated to pranav2579@gmail.com across site (data.ts, contact.tsx, resume)

- Fixed volunteer org name typo (Prajaaadharana → Prajaadharana)
